summary: Comprehensive testing of Build Your Own features for Breathing, Affirmations, and Soundscapes. All backend APIs (26/26 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test breathing patterns, affirmation sets, and soundscape mixes during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build Your Own features for Breathing, Affirmations, and Soundscapes fully tested. All CRUD operations work. AI generation for affirmation sets works (GPT-5.2). Auth required for all Build Your Own features - unauthenticated users see 'Sign in' prompt.

breathing_page.mode_toggle: ✓ 'Breathing Patterns' and 'Build Your Own' tabs present and functional

presets_mode.patterns: ✓ 5 patterns (Box Breathing, 4-7-8 Relaxation, Energizing Breath, Wim Hof Style, Pranayama Flow)
presets_mode.pattern_selection: ✓ Clicking pattern updates rhythm display and breathing circle
presets_mode.toggle_button: ✓ Changes from 'Begin Breathwork' to 'Stop' during exercise
presets_mode.guided_voice: ✓ Guided Voice and Nova buttons available

build_your_own.unauthenticated: ✓ Shows 'Sign in to create and save custom breathing patterns' prompt
build_your_own.authenticated: ✓ Shows full builder UI with saved patterns
build_your_own.saved_patterns: ✓ Displays user's saved patterns with 'Use This Pattern' button
build_your_own.sliders: ✓ Inhale, Hold (In), Exhale, Hold (Out) sliders (1-15s range)

affirmations_page.mode_toggle: ✓ 'Daily Affirmation' and 'Build Your Own Set' tabs present and functional

daily_mode.speak_button: ✓ Speak Affirmation button with Nova voice
daily_mode.theme_selector: ✓ 8 themes (Inner Peace, Abundance, Self Love, Courage, Gratitude, Healing, Consciousness, Energy)

build_your_own.unauthenticated: ✓ Shows 'Sign in to create personalized affirmation sets with AI' prompt
build_your_own.authenticated: ✓ Shows full builder UI with saved sets
build_your_own.saved_sets: ✓ Displays user's saved affirmation sets with 'View & Practice' button
build_your_own.goal_textarea: ✓ 'What do you want to affirm?' textarea
build_your_own.ai_generation: ✓ GPT-5.2 generates personalized affirmations (tested with 5 count)
build_your_own.review_edit: ✓ Generated affirmations can be edited before saving
build_your_own.viewing_set: ✓ Carousel view with Previous/Next navigation and progress dots

soundscapes_page.sounds: ✓ Gentle Rain, Ocean Waves, Forest Ambience, Singing Bowls, Mountain Wind, Crackling Fire, Distant Thunder, Flowing Stream, Night Crickets
soundscapes_page.active_indicator: ✓ Shows 'X sound(s) playing' when sounds active
soundscapes_page.your_mix: ✓ Shows active sounds with volume percentages
soundscapes_page.reset_button: ✓ 'Reset All' button to clear all sounds

save_mix.unauthenticated: ✓ 'Save This Mix' button hidden when not logged in
save_mix.authenticated: ✓ 'Save This Mix' button visible when logged in and sounds active
save_mix.save_panel: ✓ Mix name input and Save/Cancel buttons
save_mix.saved_mixes: ✓ Displays user's saved mixes with load and delete options

soundscapes_page.load_mix: ✓ Clicking saved mix restores volume levels

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/breathing/save-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (saves pattern)
GET /api/breathing/my-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns patterns)
DELETE /api/breathing/custom/{id} - 401 without auth, 200 with auth, 404 for nonexistent
POST /api/affirmations/generate-set - 401 without auth, 400 without goal, 200 with auth (AI generates affirmations)
POST /api/affirmations/save-set - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (saves set)
GET /api/affirmations/my-sets - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns sets)
DELETE /api/affirmations/set/{id} - 401 without auth, 200 with auth, 404 for nonexistent
POST /api/soundscapes/save-mix - 401 without auth, 400 without active sounds, 200 with auth (saves mix)
GET /api/soundscapes/my-mixes - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns mixes)
DELETE /api/soundscapes/mix/{id} - 401 without auth, 200 with auth, 404 for nonexistent
POST /api/affirmations/generate - 200 OK (public endpoint, AI generates single affirmation)
